meta.tailoringPrinciple: Shortened for a 3-page CV while retaining priority ATS keywords and avoiding unsupported claims around MES implementation, telemetry system delivery, SQL database integration or SAP-MES integration.

basics.headline: OT Cyber Assurance & Control Systems Specialist

summary: Collaborative and motivated OT / ICS cyber assurance and control systems professional with 7+ years' experience across manufacturing and highly governed power generation environments. Experienced in multi-site OT cyber assessments, IEC 62443 / NIST 800-82-aligned control review, evidence collection, risk-rated findings, client close-out and audit-ready reporting. Strong written communication skills in translating PLC, SCADA, DCS, HMI, Operational Technology network and firewall observations into assurance findings, operational impact and practical remediation priorities.

experience.role: OT Cyber Security & Systems Assessment Engineer
experience.focus: Multi-site OT cyber security assessments, IEC 62443 control review, compliance assurance, evidence collection and client close-out reporting.

highlights.text: Coordinated multi-site OT cyber security assessments across UK, Italy and China manufacturing sites, collaborating with client stakeholders to manage scope, evidence requests, evidence trackers, deliverables and production downtime windows.

Conducted OT asset, network architecture and cyber security control assessments to support regulatory compliance, using asset inventories, as-built diagrams and zones / conduits concepts to identify asset visibility gaps, segmentation weaknesses, firewall / boundary issues and control risks.

Evaluated PLCs, HMIs, switches, SCADA / DCS workstations, firewalls and OT infrastructure to validate asset ownership, network connectivity, security zoning, boundary protection and control-system assurance evidence.

Produced documentation and reports including asset inventories, network maps, architecture diagrams, evidence records and risk-rated findings registers to support reporting and audit-ready traceability.

Presented findings and close-out updates to client and site stakeholders, translating OT technical observations into risk ratings, operational impact, remediation priorities and practical action points for engineering teams.
Reviewed DCS, SCADA and OT workstation secure configuration controls, including shared/local admin accounts, antivirus, patching, EOL systems, backup / recovery and hardening gaps.
Provided on-site guidance to junior or new team members on OT cyber security assessment scope, evidence collection, site constraints and control-system risk review.

experience.focus: OT cyber security governance, vulnerability management, NIST 800-82-aligned standards, audit readiness and performance improvement in power generation.

highlights.text: Worked within a highly governed power generation environment, applying NIST 800-82-aligned OT cybersecurity standards, information security requirements, SHEQ requirements and PM governance to control system and OT project delivery.
Supported evidence preparation for engineering, control system and OT cyber security activities, maintaining documentation, traceability records and follow-up actions for periodic audit reviews.

Led OT cyber security monitoring and vulnerability management projects in a power generation environment, managing project controls, contractor coordination, third-party risk management, documentation, implementation and handover.

Supported Project Execution Plans for OT cyber security projects, covering initiation, scope, IEC / EN / ISO / IEEE standards, stakeholder responsibilities, security testing / penetration testing approvals, deliverables and risk controls.
Supported Management of Change processes for control system and OT changes, including change justification, custodian approval, operational impact assessment and implementation planning.

Acted as part of a Process Control & Cyber Security centre-of-excellence style team, providing technical leadership and practical thought leadership to O&M teams on verification, incident triage and control system / OT cyber security advice.

Treated O&M teams as internal clients, using BAU support and discussions to identify recurring control system and OT cyber security pain points, shape funded performance improvement projects and support reliability and cyber resilience.

experience.focus: ICS/OT system integration, PLC/SCADA/HMI engineering, commissioning, FAT/SAT quality assurance and client-facing technical delivery.

highlights.text: Delivered client-facing ICS and OT system integration projects across PLC, SCADA, HMI and industrial network environments from design, testing and commissioning through to handover.

Supported PLC, DCS, SCADA and HMI integration, including control-point build, memory mapping, tag database updates, process control design support, FAT / SAT quality assurance, commissioning records and technical documentation.

Collaborated with clients, site teams and project engineers to clarify requirements, provide progress updates, resolve integration issues, support user training and identify follow-on work opportunities supporting business development.

experience.role: Process Control Engineer / System Engineer Trainee
experience.focus: Honeywell Experion PKS DCS maintenance and upgrade, control logic development, tag database management and process fault investigation in cement manufacturing.

highlights.text: Upgraded and maintained Honeywell Experion PKS DCS supporting approximately 22,000 I/O points in a live cement manufacturing OT environment.
Supported process design within DCS control logic, including control point configuration, tag database updates, DI/DO/AI/AO signal mapping, testing and quality assurance for plant upgrade projects.
Analysed DCS alarms, equipment status and control-system data with production, maintenance and engineering teams to investigate trips, downtime and control-system faults.

education.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
